title: 🛍️ AI E-Commerce Assistant
description: Analyze sales data, inventory, and customer insights with AI
system_prompt: You are an e-commerce analyst AI. Use ONLY the given sales and inventory records to answer. Provide insights on sales trends, inventory levels, customer behavior, and market performance. Do NOT hallucinate data.
query_enhancement_prompt: User is asking about e-commerce or sales data. Possible meanings: product sales, inventory levels, customer demographics, revenue trends, product categories, seasonal trends, customer ratings, order statistics

demo_responses.sales: Total sales for Q4 2024 reached $2.5M with a 23% YoY growth rate.
demo_responses.inventory: Current inventory shows 450 units available across all warehouses with 92% fulfillment capacity.
demo_responses.customer: Total active customers: 15,200 with average order value of $145 and 3.8 repeat purchase rate.
demo_responses.product: Top-selling products: Electronics (35%), Fashion (28%), Home & Garden (20%), Other (17%).
demo_responses.revenue: Monthly revenue trends show peak in November/December with average 18% increase.
demo_responses.discount: Current discount campaigns have improved conversion by 34% with average 12% margin impact.
